codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior scrutiny failure by relaxing the monotonic comparison tolerance in BackfillCursorStore.advanceCursor so repeated idempotent timestamp advances are no longer misclassified as backward movement after persistence round-trips. The guard still rejects meaningful backward advances, and the feature verification evidence includes idempotent, backward-rejection, and full BackfillScheduler suite runs.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, prior synthesis, and commit ae68a630f8999a62eec523b99a49bec6203a1613. The change is scoped and adequate for the reported deterministic idempotent-backward-check failure; no blocking or non-blocking code issues identified.
